## Source: ossf-package-analysis (c6aa69228a321e8dac046c1953e5930f768b1166eca49861d4d90bc54f96e6f6)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified '@3stripes/common' @ 999.0.2 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
